true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy. With a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and if the target is a Boss, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> <color=#28d9ed>1</color> additional time. (Ignores Resilience)\nAfter attacking, if the target is in <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> state, own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> increases by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy. With a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and if the target is a Boss, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> <color=#28d9ed>1</color> additional time. (Ignores Resilience)\nAfter attacking, if the target is in <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> state, own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> increases by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.

(Ignores Resilience)\nAfter attacking, if the target is in <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> state, own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> increases by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.

(Ignores Resilience)\nAfter attacking, if the target is in <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> state, own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> increases by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy. With a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>, and if the target is a Boss, inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> <color=#28d9ed>1</color> additional time. (Ignores Resilience)\nAfter attacking, if the target is in <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> state, own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> increases by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵にダメージを与える。対象に<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、対象がボスなら<color=#28d9ed>1回</color>追加付与する。（効果抵抗無視）\n攻撃後、対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵にダメージを与える。対象に<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、対象がボスなら<color=#28d9ed>1回</color>追加付与する。（効果抵抗無視）\n攻撃後、対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다. 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여하고 대상이 보스라면 <color=#28d9ed>1회</color> 추가 부여합니다. (효과 저항 무시)\n공격 후 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人。以<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的概率对目标附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>，若目标为首领，则额外附加<color=#28d9ed>1次</color>。（无视效果抵抗）\n攻击后若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态，自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases and performs an <color=#28d9ed>Additional Attack</color> on the same target.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color> and if the target is Bleeding, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases and performs an <color=#28d9ed>Additional Attack</color> on the same target.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color> and if the target is Bleeding, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases and performs an <color=#28d9ed>Additional Attack</color> on the same target.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color> and if the target is Bleeding, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases and performs an <color=#28d9ed>Additional Attack</color> on the same target.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color> and if the target is Bleeding, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>. (Ignores Resilience)\nIf the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> , DMG increases and performs an <color=#28d9ed>Additional Attack</color> on the same target.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turns</color> and if the target is Bleeding, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。（効果抵抗無視）\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPし、同じ対象に<color=#28d9ed>追加攻撃</color>を与える。\n攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせ、対象が出血状態の場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。（効果抵抗無視）\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPし、同じ対象に<color=#28d9ed>追加攻撃</color>を与える。\n攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせ、対象が出血状態の場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다. (효과 저항 무시)\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해량이 증가하고 동일한 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>추가 공격</color>을 사용합니다.\n공격 후 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시키고 대상이 출혈 상태라면 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.

(효과 저항 무시)\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해량이 증가하고 동일한 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>추가 공격</color>을 사용합니다.\n공격 후 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시키고 대상이 출혈 상태라면 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人并附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>。（无视效果抵抗）\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态，伤害增加并对同一目标使用<color=#28d9ed>额外攻击</color>。\n攻击后使自身<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>在<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内提升，若目标处于出血状态，自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击敌人并附加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>。（无视效果抵抗）\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态，伤害增加并对同一目标使用<color=#28d9ed>额外攻击</color>。\n攻击后使自身<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>在<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内提升，若目标处于出血状态，自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

SKT_BURST_1.effect_jp: 出血+1ターン（効果抵抗無視）
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 出血+1回合（无视效果抵抗）

SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 追加ターン\n攻撃後、攻撃力+1ターン
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 额外回合\n攻击后攻击力+1回合

SKT_ULTIMATE.name: Nine Inch Nails
SKT_ULTIMATE.name_jp: ナイン・インチ・ネイルズ

true_desc_levels.1: When using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to <color=#28d9ed>remove all</color> <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> from a target, then attacks that target.\nThe damage is increased if the target has been inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.\nDetonates all <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> stacks on the target. Damage dealt by detonation increases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: スキル使用時、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて解除</color>し、敵単体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。対象が保有する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>をすべて<color=#28d9ed>破裂</color>させ、破裂によるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: スキル使用時、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>すべて解除</color>し、敵単体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。対象が保有する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>をすべて<color=#28d9ed>破裂</color>させ、破裂によるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>UPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>모두 해제</color>하고 적을 공격합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.\n대상의 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 모두 <color=#28d9ed>폭발</color>시키며, 폭발에 의한 피해는 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: 使用技能时，以<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的概率解除目标<color=#28d9ed>所有强化效果</color>并攻击敌人。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态，伤害增加。\n使目标<color=#28d9ed>所有出血</color>全部<color=#28d9ed>爆发</color>，爆发造成的伤害增加<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
